title: Mogrul Gravestones
description: An alternative, simple standalone gravestone mod for keeping inventory with slot memory!
body:
![logo_long](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1c3ad34d51b1786fd4ca4f2146456808929f01.png)
# Description:
An alternative gravestones mod; tired of having to race back to your items when you die so they don't despawn? with this mod, a random gravestone block with your name inscribed is left behind when you die. Simply return back to where you died and right click the grave, the slots are saved to the block, so there's no need to sort your inventory again.

## Configuration:
Mod configurations can be found in mogrulgravestones-common.toml, in your config directory.
- Enable / Disable creative gravestones.
- Enable / Disable players from breaking your gravestone.

![screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101aef20e3f6402e1c962e77bae74cd04f1f3c4d.png)

## Future Updates:
I'm looking forward to continue working on the mod while I'm studying at university, future updates would see better textures on existing gravestones and more alternatives to gravestones - I'm also planning on adding crafting recipes to the gravestones as well as the ability for you to select which gravestone spawns when you die.

## Follow Along!
I have a public Discord server where I host a minecraft server as well as updates to a variety of other mods / software I've been working on, stop on by and enjoy the fun! [https://mogrul.com/discord](https://mogrul.com/discord)
